name: Tomatoes and Okra
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups okra, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook okra, covered, in a small amount of boiling salted water for 10 minutes; drain.
2. Cook onion and green pepper in salad oil until tender, but not brown.
3. Blend in sugar, flour, and seasonings (salt, pepper).
4. Add okra and tomatoes; cook over low heat until vegetables are hot through, stirring as little as possible.
5. Makes 4 servings. (Note: You can use one 10-ounce package of frozen okra and follow the package directions for cooking. Alternatively, you can substitute one cup of canned tomatoes for fresh tomatoes.)
